commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=0ced2a9c8cbb9cb7709348b583ca8eb8d5deead2)
commands.review_summary:
The branch edits loopback/local address classifiers in device-pair, diffs, model-auth, sandbox-browser audit code, and changes two session-manager loops from inclusive to exclusive bounds.

PR surface: Source +3. Total +3 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings by source inspection: current main writes opaque leaf controls at `this.fileEntries.length` and has tests that classify `http://0.0.0.0:11434/v1` as local provider auth. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs author-visible code fixes and contributor-supplied real behavior proof before any merge path; automation should not take over while the external proof gate is missing.

target.title: fix: correct loopback address detection across multiple subsystems
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Five loopback/private address validation bugs spread across different subsystems, all following the same pattern: address ranges that are incomplete or semantically wrong.

1. **device-pair `isLoopbackHost`**: Treats `0.0.0.0` (INADDR_ANY — bind to all interfaces) and `::` (IPv6 unspecified) as loopback. These are NOT loopback addresses. The canonical implementation in `src/gateway/net.ts` explicitly excludes both. This function gates cleartext (ws://) mobile pairing host validation.

2. **diffs `isLoopbackClientIp`**: Only matches exact `127.0.0.1`, missing the full 127.0.0.0/8 loopback range. Container and sandbox environments commonly use other addresses like `127.0.0.2` etc.

3. **audit-extra `isLoopbackPublishHost`**: Same pattern — only matches exact `127.0.0.1` instead of full 127.0.0.0/8.

4. **model-auth `isLocalBaseUrl`**: Treats `0.0.0.0` as localhost — same semantic error as fix 1.

5. **session-manager off-by-one**: Two for-loops use `<=` instead of `<` when iterating `this.fileEntries`, causing an extra iteration that accesses index `array.length` (undefined). Currently masked by downstream `if (entry)` guards.

## Why This Change Was Made

Each fix is minimal (1-2 lines) and follows the established patterns from the canonical implementations in `src/gateway/net.ts` and `packages/net-policy/src/ip.ts`.

## Evidence

- **Type check**: `npx tsc --noEmit` passes with no errors
- **diffs extension tests**: 10 test files, 135 tests all pass
- **audit-extra tests**: 6/6 pass (including `isLoopbackPublishHost` coverage)
- **net.test.ts `isLoopbackHost`**: 49 test cases pass, explicitly verifying `0.0.0.0` and `::` are NOT loopback in the canonical implementation
- Each fix addresses a clear semantic error, not a matter of opinion

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: crh-code
